name: QQ

commands.name: start-detached
commands.summary: Start QQ channel bridge and NapCat as detached processes

commands.name: stop-detached
commands.summary: Stop detached QQ channel bridge, NapCat, and QQ processes

commands.name: start-task
commands.summary: Start QQ channel Task Scheduler tasks

commands.name: status-task
commands.summary: Show QQ channel Task Scheduler and health status

commands.name: status-detached
commands.summary: Show detached QQ channel process and health status

commands.name: install-task
commands.summary: Install QQ channel Task Scheduler entries

commands.name: stop-task
commands.summary: Stop QQ channel Task Scheduler tasks and processes

commands.name: avatar
commands.summary: Download a QQ avatar from qlogo.cn

args.name: qq
args.summary: QQ number to download avatar for

args.name: size
args.summary: Avatar size, commonly 100 or 640; defaults to 640

args.name: out
args.summary: Optional output file or directory; defaults to D:\agent_workspace\tmp\qq-avatar

commands.name: members

args.name: group-id
args.summary: QQ group id; defaults to bridge.config.json defaultGroup

commands.summary: List QQ group members via NapCat get_group_member_list

summary: QQ NapCat OneBot bridge to OpenCode agents
